text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Oguri Cap that a fan letter addressed to her
has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
A fan letter? For me? Whoa... What a nice
surprise.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...I guess there are people supporting me even
here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Cheers from the stands are great, but letters last
forever.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Back in my hometown, I'd read letters over and
over again for encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
All right. I need to try my hardest and race
well—not just for my own sake, but for all of my
supporters too.
